comment.body:
lets say your asset is at 100 usd
.22-delta put option premium is $2.50
uncertainity is high, market is anxious.

that $2.50 is all extrinsic value.
you need the underlying to go at least to 97.5 usd (-2.5%) in order to get to breakeven. 
bcs all your extrinsic value will decay away.
no such thing with delta-one assets like stocks and futs
